parsed.production_notes: The video combines human actors with an AI-generated robot avatar. The robot's movements are slightly stiff and its facial expressions are uncanny, typical of AI generation. The split-screen format is used to composite different video sources together.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot with a glossy white and silver casing. It has a human-like face with grey eyes and smooth, artificial skin.
characters.wardrobe: Built-in white and silver robotic casing.

characters.appearance: Young adult male with a medium build, light brown complexion, and short black hair.
characters.demeanor: Curious, slightly hesitant, and eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Young adult female with a medium build, light brown complexion, and shoulder-length dark brown hair.
characters.wardrobe: Initially a black v-neck top, later an olive green jacket over a white top.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged male with a medium build, brown complexion, and short dark hair.
characters.demeanor: Energetic and focused on his work.

scenes.setting: Split screen: Podcasting studios and a street food cart.

panels.panel_visual_description: The panel features two distinct subjects side-by-side. On the left, Character A sits in a dimly lit room with potted plants, speaking into a black microphone on a boom arm. On the right, Character B sits in a well-lit room with wooden acoustic panels and shelves, also speaking into a black microphone.

Character D stands behind a blue street food cart. He is energetically mixing ingredients in a large metal pot using a spoon. The cart has multiple small metal containers attached to its front, holding various colorful ingredients like puffed rice and peanuts.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half shows the AI avatar and the male learner in their respective studio settings. The bottom half shows a street food vendor rapidly preparing a snack. Text overlays in Malayalam and English appear throughout, translating the dialogue and highlighting key phrases.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ഈ സീൻ ഇംഗ്ലീഷിൽ എങ്ങനെ പറയും? [How do you say this scene in English?]
Character B says: Man is making food fastly.
Character A says: ഇത് പൂർണ്ണമായും തെറ്റല്ല, എങ്കിലും കുറച്ചുകൂടി നന്നായി ഇങ്ങനെ പറയാം. [This is not completely wrong, but it can be said better like this.]
Character A says: An energetic vendor aggressively mixes various ingredients into a snack with high-intensity movements.
Character B says: ഓ, ശരി ശരി. എനിക്ക് ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് അത്ര നന്നായി അറിയില്ല. [Oh, okay okay. I don't know English that well.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ഈ സീൻ ഇംഗ്ലീഷിൽ എങ്ങനെ പറയും (How to say this scene in English)
Man is making food fastly
ഇത് പൂർണ്ണമായും തെറ്റല്ല (This is not completely wrong)
എങ്കിലും കുറച്ചുകൂടി നന്നായി ഇങ്ങനെ പറയാം (but it can be said better like this)
An energetic vendor aggressively mixes various ingredients into a snack with high-intensity movements
ഓ, ശരി ശരി (Oh, okay okay)
എനിക്ക് ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് അത്ര നന്നായി അറിയില്ല (I don't know English that well)

scenes.setting: Split screen: Podcasting studios and a classroom.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits on the left in a room with plants, speaking into a microphone. Character B sits on the right in a room with wooden panels, listening and responding into his microphone.

A classroom environment. A female teacher is standing at the front, writing on a white whiteboard with a marker. Several students are seated at wooden desks in the foreground, facing the teacher and the board. The room is brightly lit with natural light coming from windows on the left.

scenes.visual_description: The screen remains split horizontally. The top half continues to show the AI avatar and the male learner. The bottom half transitions from an app interface to a live-action classroom scene, and then to an app store page. Large text overlays emphasize the cost savings of the app compared to traditional classes.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: സാരമില്ല, നീ ഒരു AI ടീച്ചറെ പരീക്ഷിച്ചു നോക്കിയോ? [No problem, have you tried an AI teacher?]
Character B says: പക്ഷെ അതിന് നല്ല ചിലവാകില്ലേ? [But won't that be very expensive?]
Character A says: ഒരിക്കലുമില്ല. സാധാരണ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് ക്ലാസുകളെക്കാൾ 7 മടങ്ങ് ചിലവ് കുറവാണ്. അതുകൊണ്ടാണ് ഒരു കോടി ആളുകൾ MySivi-ൽ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് പ്രാക്ടീസ് ചെയ്യുന്നത്. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people practice English on MySivi.]
Character B says: പക്ഷെ സമയം കിട്ടുന്നില്ല. [But I don't get time.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
സാരമില്ല (No problem)
നീ ഒരു AI ടീച്ചറെ പരീക്ഷിച്ചു നോക്കിയോ (have you tried an AI teacher)
പക്ഷെ അതിന് നല്ല ചിലവാകില്ലേ (But won't that be very expensive)
ഒരിക്കലുമില്ല (Not at all)
സാധാരണ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് ക്ലാസുകളെക്കാൾ (than normal English classes)
7 മടങ്ങ് ചിലവ് കുറവാണ് (7 times cheaper)
7X CHEAPER
അതുകൊണ്ടാണ് ഒരു കോടി ആളുകൾ (That's why 1 crore people)
MySivi-ൽ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് പ്രാക്ടീസ് ചെയ്യുന്നത് (practice English on MySivi)
പക്ഷെ സമയം കിട്ടുന്നില്ല (But I don't get time)

scenes.setting: Split screen: Podcasting studios and a plain room.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is on the left, speaking into a microphone in a plant-filled room. Character B is on the right, listening intently in a wood-paneled room.

Character C stands in a room with plain, light-colored walls and a wooden door. She is holding a smartphone in front of her face, speaking into it with a surprised and engaged expression. She then turns her body slightly to the side.

scenes.visual_description: The horizontal split continues. The top half shows the ongoing conversation between the AI and the male learner. The bottom half shows a female learner actively using her smartphone, demonstrating the ease of practicing. Text overlays highlight the short daily time commitment required.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ദിവസവും വെറും 15-20 മിനിറ്റ് പ്രാക്ടീസ് ചെയ്താൽ മതി. പതുക്കെ നീ ആത്മവിശ്വാസത്തോടെ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് സംസാരിക്കാൻ തുടങ്ങും. [Just practice for 15-20 minutes daily. Slowly you will start speaking English with confidence.]
Character B says: വൗ, എനിക്ക് എങ്ങനെ ജോയിൻ ചെയ്യാം? [Wow, how can I join?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ദിവസവും വെറും 15-20 മിനിറ്റ് പ്രാക്ടീസ് ചെയ്താൽ മതി (Just practice for 15-20 minutes daily)
പതുക്കെ നീ ആത്മവിശ്വാസത്തോടെ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് സംസാരിക്കാൻ തുടങ്ങും (Slowly you will start speaking English with confidence)
വൗ (Wow)
എനിക്ക് എങ്ങനെ ജോയിൻ ചെയ്യാം (how can I join)

scenes.setting: Split screen: Podcasting studio and a plain room.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits in a dimly lit room with potted plants in the background. She is speaking into a black microphone mounted on a boom arm.

Character C sits in a room with plain, light-colored walls. She is holding a smartphone with both hands, looking down at the screen. She smiles broadly, her face lighting up with excitement, and she raises one fist in a subtle cheering gesture.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half shows the AI avatar giving instructions. The bottom half briefly shows an app installation interface before cutting to the female learner looking thrilled while using her phone. Text overlays provide step-by-step instructions on how to download and use the app.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ഇൻസ്റ്റാൾ ബട്ടണിൽ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യൂ, MySivi ആപ്പ് ഇൻസ്റ്റാൾ ചെയ്യൂ, സൈൻ അപ്പ് ചെയ്ത് പ്രാക്ടീസ് തുടങ്ങൂ. വെറും 15 ദിവസത്തിനുള്ളിൽ മാറ്റം കണ്ടുതുടങ്ങും. ഇപ്പോൾ തന്നെ തുടങ്ങൂ. [Click on the install button, install the MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing changes in just 15 days. Start right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ഇൻസ്റ്റാൾ ബട്ടണിൽ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യൂ (Click on the install button)
MySivi ആപ്പ് ഇൻസ്റ്റാൾ ചെയ്യൂ (install the MySivi app)
സൈൻ അപ്പ് ചെയ്ത് പ്രാക്ടീസ് തുടങ്ങൂ (sign up and start practicing)
വെറും 15 ദിവസത്തിനുള്ളിൽ മാറ്റം കണ്ടുതുടങ്ങും (You will start seeing changes in just 15 days)
ഇപ്പോൾ തന്നെ തുടങ്ങൂ (Start right now)

panels.panel_visual_description: A silver smartphone is displayed against a plain, light purple background. The phone is initially shown from the back, highlighting its multi-lens camera module, before rotating to reveal its front screen.

scenes.visual_description: A 3D render of a smartphone spins into view against a light purple background. The screen displays the MySivi app logo, the tagline 'English speaking app', and a prominent 'Install Now' button.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
scenes.on_screen_text:
MySivi
English speaking app
Install Now
